data.name: 兔兔秘密花園2
data.detailed_description:
※所有涉及性內容的人物都超過20歲。

＜概要＞

無法忘懷的那一夜，再度揭開序幕——

兔兔秘密花園系列全新作品，終於正式登場！

本作是一款面向心地純潔的紳士們的最新戀愛冒險遊戲。

玩家將前往紳士們的休憩之處「兔兔秘密花園」，與個性鮮明的服務員們互相加深情誼。

除了再次與熟悉的角色相會之外，全新的角色也將加入，為您帶來超越前作的更濃密時光。

「紳士們的遊戲」也進一步進化，如何享受，全由您決定。

請忘卻痛苦的日常，盡情沉浸在甜蜜又令人心跳加速的夜晚吧。

＜故事＞

乾田杯人（名字可更改）因為在職場上犯下重大失誤而失去工作，

對一切都感到絕望。

正準備去熟悉的大眾居酒屋買醉時……

臉上滿是落寞的你，被一名女性突然攔住了。

那就是命運的相遇——。

跟著她的引導踏入的地方，

是由像兔子般可愛的女孩們款待、專為紳士準備的休憩之處——

「兔兔秘密花園」。

這次相遇，會為她們、以及你的人生帶來什麼樣的變化。

一切都取決於你……。

在與前作不同的世界線中展開的全新「兔兔秘密花園」。

全新的故事與尚未邂逅的角色，正等待著你。

＜系統＞

◆手持美酒，與兔女郎們共享甜蜜又愉快的時光。

「兔兔秘密花園」是一處為紳士們準備、充滿療癒與心動的社交場所。

在享受豐富多樣的酒類與小點的同時，也能盡情與個性鮮明的服務員女孩們聊天互動。

如果點她們喜歡的食物或飲料，說不定還能提升好感度？

而且，隨著酒意上來、她們喝醉後，或許會讓你看到平時不會展現的一面。

◆今夜，讓你的心也沉醉於最愛的她所唱的一曲。

每位服務員都有「專屬的一首歌」，那位女孩熱情高昂的歌聲，說不定會讓你不自覺聽得入迷。

而且，如果是在微醺狀態下請她唱歌，還可能會看到她平常不會展現的意外一面……。

歡笑、悸動、些許的心跳加速。

請務必親自享受服務員女孩們的舞台吧♪

＜登場人物＞

・花奈　　(Voice :Mio Hoshitani）

・凜　　　(Voice :Eri Suzuki）

・美羽香　(Voice :Masumi Tazawa）

・英梨紗　(Voice :Yukina Shuto）

・黑音　　(Voice :Ruriko Noguchi）　

・瑠那　　(Voice :Hina Natsume）　

＜工作人員＞

・角色設計:Waon Inui

・故事設計:Takayoshi Muto(Synthese)

・企劃/執行:Yujiro Usuda

data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8400 or AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650 SUPER (4GB) or AMD Radeon RX 5500 XT (4GB)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible Sound Device
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 64bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-12400 or AMD Ryzen 5 5600X
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 or AMD Radeon RX 7600
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible Sound Device

data.name: BUNNY GARDEN 2
data.detailed_description:
※All characters involved in sexual content are over the age of 21.

＜About＞

Another unforgettable night is about to begin...

Bunny Garden's brand-new title finally arrives!

This latest installment in the romance adventure game series is designed for gentlemen of pure heart who frequent the gentlemen's retreat “Bunny Garden” and connect with its uniquely charming cast.

Reunite with familiar faces while welcoming new additions, delivering an even more immersive experience than its predecessor.

The “gentleman's games” have evolved further; how you enjoy them is entirely up to you.

Forget the hardships of daily life and indulge in sweet, heart-pounding nights.

＜Story＞

Haito Kanda (name changeable) lost his job due to a major mistake at work,

and had fallen into despair over everything.

Just as he was heading to his usual cheap pub to drown his sorrows...

A woman suddenly spoke to him, noticing his dejected expression.

That was the fateful encounter...

Guided by her, he stepped into a sanctuary for gentlemen,

where women as adorable as rabbits welcomed him...

“BUNNY GARDEN.”

What changes will this encounter bring to their lives, and yours?

It's all up to you...

A new BUNNY GARDEN, set in a different world line from the previous title.

A brand-new story and a cast you have yet to meet await you.

＜System＞

◆With a drink in hand, enjoy sweet and delightful moments with the cast.

Bunny Garden is a social gathering place brimming with relaxation and excitement for gentlemen. Savor an extensive selection of drinks and snacks while enjoying conversation with the uniquely charming cast.

Ordering menu items tailored to a cast member's preferences might just boost your likability?

Furthermore, as the drinks flow and they become tipsy, they might reveal sides of themselves you've never seen before.

◆Allow your favorite girl's song to intoxicate your heart.

Each cast member has their own signature song. You might find yourself captivated by that lively girl's energetic performance!

Plus, when they sing while tipsy, you might just catch a glimpse of a surprising side you've never seen before...

Laugh, feel your heart flutter, and get a little excited. Come see the cast's stage performances with your own eyes.

＜登場人物＞

・Kana　　(Voice :Mio Hoshitani）

・Rin　　　(Voice :Eri Suzuki）

・Miuka　(Voice :Masumi Tazawa）

・Erisa　(Voice :Yukina Shuto）

・Kuon　(Voice :Ruriko Noguchi）　

・Runa　(Voice :Hina Natsume）　　

＜STAFF＞

・Character Design:Waon Inui

・Scenario:Takayoshi Muto（Synthese）

・Producer:Yujiro Usuda

English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11 64-bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-8400 or AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650 SUPER (4GB) or AMD Radeon RX 5500 XT (4GB)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible Sound Device
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 11 64bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-12400 or AMD Ryzen 5 5600X
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 or AMD Radeon RX 7600
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible Sound Device
